---
title: "Visual Data Lab"
description: "Interactive experiments in data, statistics, and machine learning."
open-graph: true
twitter-card: true
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: apps-list
    contents: apps.yml
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 4
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: true
    categories: true
    image-lazy-loading: true
    field-required:
      - title
      - description
      - image
---

:::{.catalog-hero}
:::{.catalog-kicker}
Interactive experiments in data, statistics, and machine learning.
:::

Explore data, models, and algorithms through interactive visualizations.
:::

:::{#apps-list}
:::
